name: Freecharge Plus

rewards.displayRate: 5% Cashback on bill payments and recharges via Freecharge app
2% Cashback on local commute spends (Ola, Uber, etc.)

exclusions: Utilities and telecom spends made outside Freecharge app
Transactions excluded under Axis Bank Freecharge Plus Credit Card terms
milestoneBenefits: Annual fee waived on spends of Rs 50,000 in the preceding card anniversary year, excluding rent and wallet load transactions
additionalBenefits: First-year annual fee is nil; second year onward annual fee is Rs 350
Dining benefits through Axis Bank dining programme
Convert transactions of Rs 2,500 or more into EMI

salaried: Apply digitally via the Freecharge app (invite-only rollout)
selfEmployed: Apply digitally via the Freecharge app (invite-only rollout)

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-09.

The 5% row is Freecharge-app spends only (bill payments/recharges) and the 2% row is Ola/Uber only, so both use category 'partner merchants' rather than broad online/travel (which over-ranked the card). acceleratedShare online 0 keeps general online shopping at the 1% base rate (Freecharge is a payments app, not an online-shopping site). No monthly cashback cap is disclosed in official terms, so the rows stay uncapped.
